mapper.select: SELECT * FROM forum_interest_partition WHERE status = 'ENABLED' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM forum_interest_partition WHERE partition_code = #{partitionCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM forum_interest_partition WHERE partition_name = #{partitionName} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_interest_partition (partition_code, partition_name, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{partitionCode}, #{partitionName}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
